title: First Automated Knowledge Ingestion
summary: Completed the first end-to-end automated knowledge ingestion using WEAPONIZED Episode #42. Added the episode, Joe Murgia, new relationships to Garry Nolan, David Grusch, the Sol Foundation, the UAP Disclosure Act, and the inaugural Sol Foundation symposium. Updated the transactional importer to run the complete V17.5 automation and validation pipeline.
